minor_issues: build_mitochondrion.py duplicates the manifest component list in REQUIRED_COMPONENTS instead of loading component_manifest.json, which could drift in later phases.
add_organic_finish assumes mesh objects with polygon data; this is acceptable for current calls but should either stay mesh-only by convention or guard object type before broader reuse.
The builder report is generated from inside the build script and currently self-certifies several checklist values; later phases should keep specialist review reports separate from builder output.
